Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1

This patch looks correct, but it is causing repeated test failures in sanity test_27F and test_27C.  It seems that the OST is not connecting quickly enough and is being skipped because of the change?  In any case, the test needs to be fixed before the patch can land.

parents.subject: LU-11176 systemd: use univeral path for modprobe

commit.subject: LU-4637 osp: Report disconnected OSTs as unhealthy
commit.message:
LU-4637 osp: Report disconnected OSTs as unhealthy

Disconnected OST is not really healthy, so ignore it for purpose
of allocations.

Change-Id: Iaa03fd308430a7c6a4bfb879065fc74df8f19efd
Signed-off-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
